arts.ttl: Van de Ven: Spurs want to win UEL for Ange
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven has said Tottenham Hotspur players want to win the Europa League for under-fire manager Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Son Heung Min ruled out of Europa League quarter-final in Tottenham injury blow
arts.sum: A foot injury rules the Spurs captain out of the second leg against Eintracht Frankfurt

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars talk about winning the Europa League EVERY day as Ange's man bins football's biggest cliche
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's last hope of lifting silverware this season rests on Thursday's quarter-final clash with Eintracht Frankfurt

arts.ttl: Postecoglou has 'no idea' about his Spurs future
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou says he does not know whether he will remain Tottenham Hotspur head coach beyond the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Incredible new Arsenal chant pokes fun at Tottenham ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Arsenal supporters have used the Gunners' Champions League success as an opportunity to poke fun at north London rivals Tottenham in Madrid. Mikel Arteta's men take on Real Madrid in the second-leg of their Champions League quarter-final with a 3-0 lead to defend.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou provides Son Heung-min injury update ahead of Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Postecoglou confirmed on Wednesday that the South Korean has been suffering with a foot injury in recent weeks. Ange Postecoglou has confirmed Tottenham captain Son Heung-min has not travelled to Germany ahead of Spurs' Europa League quarter-final second leg clash with Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Frankfurt vs. Tottenham preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview for Thursday's Europa League clash between the last German representative in the competition, Eintracht Frankfurt, and their opponent Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans create chant mocking Tottenham hours before Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have descended on the Spanish capital ahead of their Champions League quarter-final clash with Real Madrid as they chant about Tottenham's current predicament

arts.ttl: Tottenham sent huge Eintracht Frankfurt warning ahead of crucial Europa League clash
arts.sum: Koch added: “Well, I think we shouldn’t count on that and shouldn’t expect that Tottenham all of a sudden don’t know how to play football because they are away. The key for success tomorrow will be that we have a good start into the match, we are right away on the pitch and that we make use of the advantage of playing at home.”

arts.ttl: Tottenham without injured Heung-min Son for Eintracht Frankfurt showdown
arts.sum: A huge blow for Spurs ahead of their do-or-die clash
